user.title: WebSocket Bridge
user.description: A generic bridge that creates entities declared by any WebSocket client (such as a gateway app). No extra config needed here. Enter this HA's URL and a long-lived access token in the client.

user.title: Add Gateway
user.description: Register a gateway (e.g., mobile app) to connect. When a client with this Gateway ID connects, its entities and sub-devices will be grouped under this gateway.
